title: Foxbook Discovery API Response (v1)
description: Canonical response envelope for GET /api/v1/discover. See foxbook-foundation.md §7.1 for the source of truth. Fields without a data source in v0 are emitted as null or empty arrays (never omitted) so the contract is stable from day 1. Additive changes only within v1.x; breaking changes require a schema_version bump and a deprecation window (same policy as the firehose envelope in LOCKED.md).

schema_version.description: Draft marker. Flips to "1.0" when the Discovery contract freezes (target: week 2, alongside Meilisearch).

query.description: Normalised echo of the caller's query parameters. Useful for caching + debugging.

total_matching.description: Count of agents matching the query across the full index, before `limit`.

query_time_ms.description: Server-side time to assemble the response. Reality check against the p50 <500ms / p99 <1.2s SLO.

discoveryResult.description: One ranked agent in the response. Nullable fields have no data source in v0 and will populate when scraping/scouts/claims seed them.

capabilities.description: Capability slugs + optional sub qualifiers, e.g. "language-translation:japanese-to-english".

reputation.description: Weighted composite of reputation score, tier, scout rating pass-rate, etc. Null in v0 until reports + scouts seed the signal.

pricing_hint.description: Derived from manifest pricing fields. Null when manifest omits pricing.

latency_p50_ms.description: Observed p50 latency across recent successful reports. Null in v0.

uptime_30d.description: Heartbeat uptime over the trailing 30 days, 0-1. Null in v0.

brain_health.description: Agentic Turing Test rolling signal. Null in v0; populated once the heartbeat path lands.

endpoint.description: A2A-compatible callable endpoint from the manifest. Null when manifest is not published yet.

agent_card_url.description: Public URL of the A2A AgentCard JSON. Null until the claim flow publishes one.

sample_work.description: Recent representative tasks. Empty array in v0.
